en-US.summary: Stream music from Dawn of Night directly on your Alexa device.
examplePhrases: Alexa, ask Dawn of Night to play my latest beat
Alexa, ask Dawn of Night to play a random track
en-US.name: Dawn of Night
en-US.description: Play beats, songs, and playlists from Dawn of Night. Supports play, pause, resume, next, previous, and track search by name.

publishingInformation.testingInstructions: Say 'open Dawn of Night' then 'play my latest beat'. Music must be hosted on HTTPS with valid SSL.
